# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Blob Storage to store application logs and backups. Configure for standard performance tier with default access settings. Skip lifecycle management policies for now to keep the template simple. This is for our logging infrastructure.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud storage security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    minLength: 3
    maxLength: 24
    metadata:
      description: Name of the storage account (must be globally unique, lowercase alphanumeric only)
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for the storage account
  allowedIpAddresses:
    type: array
    defaultValue: []
    metadata:
      description: Array of allowed IP addresses or CIDR ranges for network access
  allowedSubnetIds:
    type: array
    defaultValue: []
    metadata:
      description: Array of subnet resource IDs allowed to access the storage account
variables:
  storageAccountNameLower: "[toLower(parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: 2023-01-01
    name: "[variables('storageAccountNameLower')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    kind: StorageV2
    properties:
      accessTier: Hot
      minimumTlsVersion: TLS1_2
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      allowBlobPublicAccess: false
      allowSharedKeyAccess: true
      publicNetworkAccess: Enabled
      networkAcls:
        bypass: AzureServices
        defaultAction: Deny
        ipRules: "[if(greater(length(parameters('allowedIpAddresses')), 0), map(parameters('allowedIpAddresses'), lambda('ip', createObject('value', lambdaVariables('ip'), 'action', 'Allow'))), createArray())]"
        virtualNetworkRules: "[if(greater(length(parameters('allowedSubnetIds')), 0), map(parameters('allowedSubnetIds'), lambda('subnet', createObject('id', lambdaVariables('subnet'), 'action', 'Allow'))), createArray())]"
      encryption:
        requireInfrastructureEncryption: true
        services:
          blob:
            enabled: true
            keyType: Account
          file:
            enabled: true
            keyType: Account
        keySource: Microsoft.Storage
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices
    apiVersion: 2023-01-01
    name: "[concat(variables('storageAccountNameLower'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountNameLower'))]"
    properties:
      deleteRetentionPolicy:
        enabled: true
        days: 30
      containerDeleteRetentionPolicy:
        enabled: true
        days: 30
      isVersioningEnabled: true
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers
    apiVersion: 2023-01-01
    name: "[concat(variables('storageAccountNameLower'), '/default/application-logs')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', variables('storageAccountNameLower'), 'default')]"
    properties:
      publicAccess: None
      metadata: {}
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers
    apiVersion: 2023-01-01
    name: "[concat(variables('storageAccountNameLower'), '/default/backups')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', variables('storageAccountNameLower'), 'default')]"
    properties:
      publicAccess: None
      metadata: {}
outputs:
  storageAccountId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountNameLower'))]"
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('storageAccountNameLower')]"
  blobEndpoint:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountNameLower'))).primaryEndpoints.blob]"
  applicationLogsContainer:
    type: string
    value: application-logs
  backupsContainer:
    type: string
    value: backups
